name: BMW BMW i5 eDrive
description: The 2026 BMW i5 eDrive35L is a fully electric executive sedan that delivers a quiet, luxurious driving experience with a 286-horsepower rear-wheel-drive powertrain, 79.05 kWh battery, and up to 536 km of CLTC driving range. Its long-wheelbase design provides outstanding rear passenger comfort while retaining BMW's premium technology, refined interior, and engaging driving characteristics.
features:
105 mm

The extended wheelbase provides exceptional rear-seat legroom

making it ideal for executive or chauffeur-driven use.

Interior Features
12.3-inch digital instrument cluster
14.9-inch curved central touchscreen
BMW Operating System 8.5
Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto
Premium ambient lighting
Panoramic glass roof
Heated and ventilated seats (depending on trim)
Harman Kardon premium sound system
Wireless phone charging
Four-zone climate control (available)
Safety & Driver Assistance
Adaptive Cruise Control
Lane Keeping Assist
Blind Spot Monitoring
Automatic Emergency Braking
360° Surround View Camera
Parking Assistant Plus
Traffic Sign Recognition
Driver Attention Monitoring
